basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has released the official Havildar (Security) Notification 2026 on 2026 at bel-india.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with SSLC (Pass) qualification and 15 years of service in the Indian Armed Forces, along with applicable age relaxation rules (as per category), can apply offline on or before 08 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit applicable to General Category candidates. Relaxation for OBC (NCL) is 3 years, for SC is 5 years.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 43 years for General Category candidates. Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC (NCL) candidates, 5 years for SC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: SSLC (Pass) with 15 years of service in Indian Armed Forces
qualification.details: SSLC (Pass) 15 years of service in Indian Armed Forces Ex-servicemen (100% reservation) Exemplary / very good record Medical category 'AYE' and SHAPE-I Fire training is desirable Registration at District Sainik Welfare Board is mandatory Knowledge of Tamil language is essential

salary_details.details: Grade: WG-III / CP-III Pay Scale: Rs. 20,500/- - 3% Allowances: Rs. 79,000/- + admissible allowances

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BEL Havildar (Security) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BEL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BEL Havildar (Security) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BEL Havildar (Security) Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: SSLC (Pass) 15 years of service in Indian Armed Forces Ex-servicemen (100% reservation) Exemplary / very good record Medical category 'AYE' and SHAPE-I Fire training is desirable Registration at District Sainik Welfare Board is mandatory Knowledge of Tamil language is essential

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: BEL Havildar (Security) Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 43 years for General Category candidates. Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC (NCL) candidates, 5 years for SC candidates.

content_sections.heading: BEL Havildar (Security) Salary Details
content_sections.text: Grade: WG-III / CP-III Pay Scale: Rs. 20,500/- - 3% Allowances: Rs. 79,000/- + admissible allowances

rows.event: Last date for receiving the complete applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BEL Havildar (Security) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the complete applications for the BEL Havildar (Security) recruitment is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Havildar (Security) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSLC and possess 15 years of service in the Indian Armed Forces to be eligible for the Havildar (Security) post.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Havildar (Security) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Havildar (Security) post in Bharat Electronics Limited.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Havildar (Security) post?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for General Category candidates is 43 years, with relaxations for OBC (NCL) and SC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Havildar (Security) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 20,500/- - 3% admissible allowances, with a CTC of Rs. 79,000/- + admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential requirements for the Havildar (Security) post besides education and service?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an exemplary/very good record, 'AYE' medical category with SHAPE-I, and knowledge of the Tamil language is essential.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Havildar (Security) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Physical Endurance Test and a Written Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: The application should be sent to AGM (HR&A), Bharat Electronics Limited, BEL-ARMY ROAD, NANDAMBAKKAM, CHENNAI - 600089, TAMILNADU.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
